debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
⊢ inner ℂ x (a y) =
    (toComplexMeasure (@toResolutionOfIdentity H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha) x y).integral
      ⇑(Function.Embedding.subtype (spectrum ℂ a))

failed_attempts:
have hμ : toComplexMeasure (toResolutionOfIdentity ha) x y = cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y := by
    apply ComplexMeasure.ext; intro s hs
    simp [toComplexMeasure_apply, toResolutionOfIdentity, toBoundedBilin,
      InnerProductSpace.continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply]
    exact (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral_indicator hs
  rw [hμ, cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.integral_rieszMeasure]
  simp [cfc_toLinearFunctional_apply]
  congr 2
  exact cfcHom_id ha.isStarNormal
